Officials watch nearby.
[94-98] Runners clear white hurdles on the blue track, landing and sprinting forward. A leader in a black outfit maintains a gap ahead of athletes in white and green tops. The camera pans right, revealing officials standing near the track edge and red barriers in the background. Banners with 'FUEL' and 'ORLEN' text are visible as the race progresses towards the next set of obstacles.

[98-102] Female athletes sprint on a blue track with white lane numbers 1-8 towards the finish. The camera pans right past red barriers, officials, and 'MKL' banners, with a 'Beautiful sports LIVE' overlay in the top right. A white podium with red accents appears in the bottom right as runners finish.
[102-106] The scene fades to a black screen featuring white text. "Thank you for watching" is centered above "Subscribe & Like". This static outro message remains visible against the dark background.
